retry_reason: kref_put is a release operation; retrying would cause a double-put, which is a use-after-free bug.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that decrements the reference count of a pse_control object. Must be called with pse_list_mutex held. After this call, the caller must not use the object unless it holds another reference; if the refcount reaches zero, the object is freed via __pse_control_release. No return value to check; the caller is responsible for ensuring the reference being released is valid.
